title: The Mole (horror)
description: Adds terrifying creature that hides deep down.
body:

## THIS MOD CAN BREAK BLOCKS. IT CAN BE DISABLED IN THE CONFIGURATION FILE
## GECKOLIB REQUIRED

The mole is a horror mod that adds single entity. It's blind but has good hearing. Focus on stealth and use snowballs to distract it.

The mole is active at night on the surface and at day in the caves. Keep that in mind.

## Main mechanics of mod:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

At day mole is active in the caves. If you are not quiet enough it will notice you and charge at you with insane speed. It's instakill you so be careful in the caves. Mobs will try to run from the path in order to save their lifes. Unlucky ones will be killed.



</details>
